title: Calyptracordia alba
taxonomy: Calyptracordia alba is classified within the family Malpighiaceae. It belongs to the order Malpighiales. At the family level, it is closely related to other plants such as Banisteriopsis and Coussapoa. Calyptracordia alba is a member of the class Magnoliopsida, which includes flowering plants. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
